integrity.diagnosis: 182 records with real LLM activity (in=18226, out=7560 tokens, $0.0132).

baselineSurface: Extract the transaction info from the message as JSON.

scores.name: gepa-reflection
scores.winnerSurface: Extract the transaction info from the message as JSON with exactly the keys: merchant, amount, date, category. amount must be a bare decimal number (no currency symbol). date must be in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. category must be one of: groceries, dining, transport, utilities, entertainment.

scores.name: skill-opt
scores.winnerSurface:
Extract the transaction info from the message as JSON with keys: merchant, amount, date, category. amount must be a bare number (no currency symbol or commas). date must be in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD. category must be one of: groceries, dining, transport, utilities, entertainment.
For merchant, use the payee or store name mentioned in the message.

Date must be in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. Category must be one of: groceries, dining, transport, utilities, entertainment.
